title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: You are going to read an article about four people describing their daily commute or preferred mode of transport. For questions 43–52, choose from the people (A–D). The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.A:
### Laura, 27, Teacher
[43]I cycle to work every day, rain or shine[/43]. It keeps me fit and I enjoy the fresh air. [47]I avoid traffic jams and save money on transport[/47]. [50]Sometimes, I wish there were more cycle lanes in the city[/50].
texts.B:
### Mike, 39, Accountant
[44]I drive to work because public transport isn’t reliable where I live[/44]. [48]I listen to podcasts during my commute to make the time productive[/48]. [51]I try to carpool with colleagues when possible to reduce costs[/51].
texts.C:
### Nina, 23, Student
[45]I use the bus and train to get to university[/45]. It’s affordable, but [49]delays are common, so I always leave early[/49]. [52]I like reading during the journey, which makes it less boring[/52].
texts.D:
### Greg, 31, Chef
[46]I walk to work because I live nearby[/46]. [47]It’s relaxing and gives me time to think[/47]. [49]I appreciate not having to deal with crowded buses or trains[/49].

questions.question: commutes by bicycle regardless of the weather?
questions.explanation: Laura cycles to work every day, rain or shine.

questions.question: drives to work due to unreliable public transport?
questions.explanation: Mike drives because public transport isn’t reliable.

questions.question: uses more than one type of public transport to travel?
questions.explanation: Nina uses both bus and train to get to university.

questions.question: walks to work because of proximity?
questions.explanation: Greg walks to work because he lives nearby.

questions.question: avoids traffic jams on their commute?
questions.explanation: Laura avoids traffic jams by cycling.

questions.question: makes their commute more enjoyable by listening to something?
questions.explanation: Mike listens to podcasts during his commute.

questions.question: leaves early to avoid being late due to delays?
questions.explanation: Nina leaves early because delays are common.

questions.question: wishes for better cycling infrastructure?
questions.explanation: Laura wishes there were more cycle lanes.

questions.question: tries to share car journeys to save money?
questions.explanation: Mike tries to carpool with colleagues to reduce costs.

questions.question: enjoys reading during their commute?
questions.explanation: Nina likes reading during her journey.
